title: Shinra Tensei!
description: Become Pain from Naruto and farm aura. This mod is created and updated as a part of my video series on Youtube where I code it into reality (in Turkish).
body: ![Third person](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZ2E3c2lqanV1M2g0cGgzenhzYzM0dWFkMnJya2lpMzgzZTc2Z2YweSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vNPtyiNh0f8ilFdsQp/giphy.gif) ![Bansho Tenin!](http://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOGtvem81NDR6NTZtcjZxYW44MHh1dHF0NzdnM2ZtbDloazBwbWRscSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/1nped1U5GsYphH6aAu/giphy.gif) ![Shinra Tensei!](http://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMml2em5oYjYweTNrMmRiaDBjbHB6eDR2cXNvdWJjcm1jNnJwMGpvdCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/b6ooa0WsVcuZ9vYaQZ/giphy.gif) ![Ability in action](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdTVmZ3FodmIwZWtpdnBtMTFnY2RzaG15MGplOHprc2U2cTF5dW8wZCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/xTXrQZUoQPSenM0Lzi/giphy.gif)   This mod offers the ultimate path to godhood.   Core Abilities: Shinra Tensei (Push): Hold "O" to charge a devastating push ability. The longer you hold it the more pain you are destined to teach the world (drains Chakra). Bansho Tenin (Pull): Press "P" to pull entities toward you to make them hover helplessly and slowly follow your crosshair. Pain Flight: Press "G" to counter gravity by exerting an upward force. (on yourself -> you go flying xD)   New Progression Update: Chakra Crystals: Found in dungeons/temples (or dropped by crystal bearers). Use them to permanently increase your max chakra and regen. The Rinnegan: A legendary loot found only in End and Ancient Cities. Grants a massive chakra boost but your body can only handle 2 uses. Crystal Bearers: 1 in 300 hostile mobs will mutate into tanky mini bosses. Hunt them down for massive XP and guaranteed Chakra Crystals.   [https://youtu.be/3NdMi4Og37g](https://youtu.be/3NdMi4Og37g)
